title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider LLM workflows by testing four combinations of Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 across planning and implementation stages using real GitHub issues. An Opus-based evaluator scored the outputs on seven dimensions including correctness, code quality, and fidelity to plan.
